channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-10 13:57 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: "A civilization is not destroyed by wicked men; it is destroyed by weak men who cannot defend what i...
item.description: "A civilization is not destroyed by wicked men; it is destroyed by weak men who cannot defend what is good.” — G. K. Chesterton

item.title: @elonmusk: To support the people of Japan and show that it was safe to visit. Most people in America at the tim...
item.description: To support the people of Japan and show that it was safe to visit. Most people in America at the time were afraid to travel to Japan, due to a misplaced fear of radiation.

item.title: @elonmusk: This may very well be the first ice cream 🍨 bought on@XMoneyand it was free 🙌🏻because of the Welcome...
item.description: This may very well be the first ice cream 🍨 bought on@XMoneyand it was free 🙌🏻because of the Welcome Gift of $25. 😉👍🏻@elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: Made my first purchase using XMoney. I took my daughter out in the Cybertruck for ice cream on the $...
item.description: Made my first purchase using XMoney. I took my daughter out in the Cybertruck for ice cream on the $25 joining gift. Thanks@XMoneyand@WilliamShatner!

item.title: @elonmusk: Most people see the new Anti-Muslimness law as an attack on free speech. It is even worse than that....
item.description: Most people see the new Anti-Muslimness law as an attack on free speech. It is even worse than that. It is the final building block in the foundations to replace Christianity with Islam in the United Kingdom Our Christian constitution and culture is being set aside.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon: xAI is basically a toddler with adult performance. Topping voice, image, video, and forecastin...
item.description: Elon: xAI is basically a toddler with adult performance. Topping voice, image, video, and forecasting leaderboards like it owns them. Grok 4.20 calling the future. Imagine scaling. The 𝕏 app moving fast. 100,000 H100s. Marching toward a million. It’s not the age. It’s the pace. xAI moves fastest.@elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: The United States runs the most influential elections in the World. Our standards should be higher w...
item.description: The United States runs the most influential elections in the World. Our standards should be higher when it comes to election integrity. Requiring proof of citizenship and Voter ID isn’t about suppressing votes. It's about protecting the legitimacy of the system.

item.title: @elonmusk: Holodeck by Grok Imagine extension video
item.description: Holodeck by Grok Imagine extension video

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine can make 30 second videos. Press extend. Imagine and create that reality.
item.description: Grok Imagine can make 30 second videos. Press extend. Imagine and create that reality.

item.title: @elonmusk: John Thune is a failure who needs to be removed from his leadership role in the Senate. He’s done.
item.description: John Thune is a failure who needs to be removed from his leadership role in the Senate. He’s done.

item.title: @elonmusk: If you participate you will get $1 from me and $25 as a Welcome Gift from X. You can connect a bank ...
item.description: If you participate you will get $1 from me and $25 as a Welcome Gift from X. You can connect a bank account to move money into the account at 6% yearly interest, set up a virtual debit card to spend that $25 while you order your physical metal debit card from the bank…

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 Money early public access will launch next month
item.description: 𝕏 Money early public access will launch next month

item.title: @elonmusk: The side that needs to build a wall to keep people from leaving is the bad side
item.description: The side that needs to build a wall to keep people from leaving is the bad side

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
